actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour Reset (id 1648876975, guid 22172de818174a8b99ab08c2d6c3f0b2) attached to Reset Plane handles OnCollisionEnter(Collision) to reposition colliding objects tagged 'XRRig' or 'Weapon' to StartLocation (9.47, -6.6, -5.84).
